underlying_goal: Build a Ladder Entry/Exit Mean Reversion trading strategy for FreqTrade with proper backtesting, then build a frontend UI to analyze backtest results with expandable DCA orders and chart annotations
friction_detail: Multiple rounds of column alignment fixes (colspan/CSS issues), Claude built a custom table instead of reusing existing DataTable component, and strategy had several logic bugs (inverted pricing, wrong pair universe).
brief_summary: User built a DCA ladder trading strategy and backtest analysis UI across strategy, backend, and frontend files; most features were delivered but required many iteration rounds to fix display bugs and strategy logic issues.
